mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.nickname AS "nickname", a.type AS "type", a.isjy AS "isjy", a.jy_time AS "jyTime", a.zimu AS "zimu", a.isfanyi AS "isfanyi", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex",
`group`.name AS "group.name", `group`.icon AS "group.icon", `group`.idno AS "group.idno"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid LEFT JOIN t_group `group` ON `group`.id = a.group_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_group_item( id, uid, group_id, nickname, `type`, isjy, jy_time, zimu, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{group.id}, #{nickname}, #{type}, #{isjy}, #{jyTime}, #{zimu}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_group_item SET uid = #{u.id}, group_id = #{group.id}, nickname = #{nickname}, `type` = #{type}, isjy = #{isjy}, jy_time = #{jyTime}, zimu = #{zimu}, isfanyi = #{isfanyi}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_group_item SET isjy = '0', jy_time = NULL, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
